stories.headline: Taylor Swift’s Wedding Guests Are Starting To Share Impressions Of That Magical Night At MSG - TODAY.com
stories.summary: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding guests are sharing their impressions of the nuptials on social media while two particular guests shared details of the event with NBC News.

stories.headline: 'Minions & Monsters' Box Office: Sequel Has Worst Opening in Franchise, 'Supergirl' Suffers Brutal Drop - Variety
stories.summary: Although "Minions & Monsters" led the box office over the Fourth of July weekend, the animated family film opened way behind projections.

stories.headline: Paul McCartney Played Beatles Classic for First Time Since 1964 at Taylor Swift’s Wedding - Rolling Stone
stories.summary: Paul McCartney performed the Beatles classic "I Want to Hold Your Hand" live for the first time since 1964 at Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding.

stories.headline: Harry Styles Honors One Direction Bandmates During Final Wembley Show - TMZ
stories.summary: Harry Styles gave fans an unforgettable moment during the final night of his Wembley Stadium run ... taking time to publicly thank his former One Direction bandmates in a heartfelt speech that left t…

stories.headline: Patrick Mahomes, Brittany Mahomes Enjoy Elegant Date Night at Travis Kelce, Taylor Swift’s Wedding - E! News
stories.summary: Patrick Mahomes and his wife Brittany Mahomes attended Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding at Madison Square Garden July 3, turning the historic event into a special date night.

stories.headline: Thousands of miles from D.C., a July Fourth extravaganza not about Trump - The Washington Post
stories.summary: A musical “block party” in Los Angeles offered a striking contrast to the July Fourth celebration in Washington, D.C., anchored by the president.
